tier.description: Tier 1 = single training; Tier 2 = essentials/advanced/expert track; Tier 3 = certification programme.

topic.description: Topic or skill to be trained.

primary_objective.description: What participants must be able to do at the end.

backbone.description: Methodology backbone (e.g. DMAIC, PDCA). Optional; planner picks if absent.

case_sector.description: Sector/industry the fictional case should live in (e.g. retail, banking, manufacturing).

tools.description: Software/tools learners will use (Power BI, Excel, etc.).

branding_overrides.description: Optional overrides — leave empty to use the supplied Maverx master.

follow_ups_asked.description: Log of follow-up questions the intake agent asked (audit trail for QA).
